steps.name: env-and-packages
steps.summary: Extended env layer with requireEnv() and AppEnv type (adding EXPO_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY), updated supabase/index.ts and infrastructure/index.ts barrel to use the new API, created .env.example, and installed expo-av and expo-file-system via npx expo install. All acceptance criteria pass.

steps.name: gemini-script-service
steps.summary: Created infrastructure/ai/gemini.ts with generateMeditationScript() and buildPrompt() using the Gemini REST API, added infrastructure/ai/index.ts barrel, and re-exported from infrastructure/index.ts. All acceptance criteria pass: verify.py, typecheck, and lint are clean.

steps.name: gemini-tts-service
steps.summary: Created infrastructure/ai/tts.ts with generateAudio() that calls the Gemini TTS Preview API, builds a WAV header from raw PCM data, and writes the file using the new expo-file-system File/Paths API. Updated infrastructure/ai/index.ts to re-export generateAudio. All acceptance criteria pass: verify.py, typecheck, and lint are clean.
